The '''Second Army''', also known as the '''2nd Sector Army''' or '''Green Mantle Command''', was a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] Reserve [[Sector Army/Legends|Sector Army]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Led by [[Senior Jedi General]] [[Ry-Gaul]] and based on [[Nubia/Legends|Nubia]], the 2nd was one of the two Sector Armies that composed [[Systems Army Alpha]], which was commanded by [[High Jedi General/Legends|High Jedi General]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]. Officially charged with the defense of the [[Corellian Oversector]], the forces of the 2nd Sector Army saw action across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] as reserve troops for other Sector Armies, and the 2nd's [[327th Star Corps/Legends|327th Star Corps]] became renowned under the leadership of [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]].

When [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] [[Declaration of a New Order|declared]] a new [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] of the 2nd Sector Army turned on their [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] commanders in accordance with [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], and the 2nd were placed under the command of [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Fliry Vorru]].

==History==
The 2nd Sector Army was one of twenty [[Sector Army/Legends|Sector Armies]] that composed the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], and was based on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Nubia/Legends|Nubia]]. Green Mantle Command, as the 2nd became known, was one of two Sector Armies that made up [[Systems Army Alpha]], which was commanded by the [[High Jedi General/Legends|High Jedi General]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]. The 2nd itself was led by [[Senior Jedi General]] [[Ry-Gaul]], and was designed as reserve command for other Sector Armies.<ref name="EGW" />

The 2nd Sector Army's primary role was to defend [[Corellian Oversector|Sector 2]] and the vital [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] junctions at [[Denon/Legends|Denon]] and [[Duro/Legends|Duro]]. Denon, an [[Ecumenopolis/Legends|ecumenopolis]] like [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], sat at the intersection of the [[Corellian Run/Legends|Corellian Run]] and the [[Hydian Way/Legends|Hydian Way]], and Duro was one of the first stops of the [[Corellian Trade Spine/Legends|Corellian Trade Spine]] after the route split from the Corellian Run at [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. The 2nd also blockaded the [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] [[Purse world/Legends|Purse Worlds]] later in the war.<ref name="EGW" />

[[File:327thStarCorps-ROTS.png|thumb|left|200px|Marshal Commander Bly and his troops eliminate General Secura]]
As a Sector Army, the 2nd initially consisted of 147,456 [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] and additional support personnel, divided into four [[Corps/Legends|corps]]. The most notable of the 2nd Sector Army's four corps was the [[327th Star Corps/Legends|327th Star Corps]], commanded by [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]], which was one of the GAR's most active units during the Clone Wars. Troopers of the 327th were distinguished by yellow stripes on their armor, and they were led by [[Clone Marshal Commander/Legends|Marshal Commander]] [[Bly/Legends|CC-5052]] (nicknamed "Bly"). One of the Corps' squads was [[Talon Squad]], which fell under the [[2nd Platoon]], [[Bacta Company]], [[Hawkbat Battalion]], [[101st Regiment]], and the [[7th Legion]] of the Corps. Another known unit was Hawkbat Battalion's [[K Company]].<ref name="Insider" />

In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], the 327th Star Corps participated in the [[Siege of Saleucami/Legends|Siege of Saleucami]], a brutal five-month long campaign near the end of the Clone Wars.<ref name="EGW" /> Not long after, [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] [[Declaration of a New Order|declared]] himself [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] and issued [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] to the Grand Army. The 2nd Sector Army turned on their Jedi commanders, with Marshal Commander Bly and his troops killing General Secura personally on [[Felucia/Legends|Felucia]],<ref name="ROTS">{{Film|III}}</ref> and Ry-Gaul only escaping the fate of his comrades by being on a special assignment in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].<ref name="ATE5">''[[The Last of the Jedi: Against the Empire]]''</ref> Under the new [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the 2nd Sector Army became part of the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Military]], and were place under the command of [[Fliry Vorru]], the new [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] of Sector 2—which was reorganized into the Corellian Oversector.<ref name="EGW" />
